advancement.inf_iron.root.title: Entrance to the Swamp
advancement.inf_iron.root.description: The first step to eternal grind. Obtain 1x Compressed Iron.
advancement.inf_iron.ultimate_iron.title: Physics is Crying
advancement.inf_iron.ultimate_iron.descr: Obtain 18x Compressed Iron. Its density is likely illegal.
advancement.inf_iron.ultimate_star.title: Witness of Universe's End
advancement.inf_iron.ultimate_star.descr: Obtain 9x Compressed Nether Star. Wither extinction confirmed.
advancement.inf_iron.deicide.title: How to Commit Deicide
advancement.inf_iron.deicide.description: Obtain God Killer. Not even the devs can stop you now.
advancement.inf_iron.final_sentence.desc: Obtain Ferrum of Execution. One swing to close the world.
advancement.inf_iron.inevitable_end.desc: Obtain Homing Bow. If you're not aiming, why fire?
advancement.inf_iron.eternal_divinity.de: Obtain full Eternal Armor. Too invincible to be fun?
advancement.inf_iron.halo_creator.title: The Golden Halo
advancement.inf_iron.halo_creator.descri: Obtain Halo of Immortality. Floating is the new fashion.
advancement.inf_iron.abyss_gaze.title: Gazing into the Abyss
advancement.inf_iron.abyss_gaze.descript: Obtain Veritas of the Void Abyss. Don't forget to blink.
advancement.inf_iron.wings_destruction.d: Obtain Funnel Curios. Your back seems a bit busy.
advancement.inf_iron.god_slayer.title: God's Retirement
advancement.inf_iron.god_slayer.descript: Defeat Atheos. Good job, the world is now yours.
advancement.inf_iron.dreaming_metal.desc: Obtain Orichalcum. The endless cycle of compression.
